---
title: "Willingham Franklin Rawnsley"
---

## Willingham Franklin Rawnsley

**Dates:** (1845-1927)

### Description

schoolmaster

### Biography

He married (1880) Alice Julia Argles (b. 1848/9).

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 26th 1899
- Letter from July 17th 1879

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
